prompt_summary: A collection of calm, engaging, and gender-neutral printable pages designed for kids aged 3-7, featuring activities that foster creativity and learning without overstimulation.

packs.title: Coloring Pages Pack
packs.subtitle: Gentle everyday scenes and phrase pages for ages 3 to 7.
packs.cover_caption: Everyday moments, calm pages, and simple encouragement.
packs.preview_prompt: Minimal black and white kids printable bundle cover page on soft neutral desk, calm modern lifestyle brand, clean typography, not childish, Made For This aesthetic

pages.title: Coloring Page - Family At Home
pages.caption: Color the family and the cozy home scene.

pages.title: Coloring Page - Reading Time
pages.caption: A calm page for quiet reading time.

pages.title: Coloring Page - You've Got This
pages.caption: Color the phrase and trace your own ideas below.

pages.title: Coloring Page - Be Kind
pages.caption: Use this page for a calm coloring break.

packs.title: Mazes Pack
packs.subtitle: Clean easy-to-medium mazes with enough challenge to stay fun.
packs.cover_caption: Clear paths and calm layouts for easy printing.
packs.preview_prompt: Black and white kids maze printable cover mockup, calm modern printable bundle, neutral desk scene, clean paper stack, premium minimal brand

pages.title: Maze 1
pages.caption: Help the character find the way home.

pages.title: Maze 3
pages.caption: Guide the child to the goal.

packs.title: Trace & Learn Pack
packs.subtitle: Letters, numbers, and easy words with room to practice.
packs.cover_caption: Clean tracing pages with matching icons and calm spacing.
packs.preview_prompt: Minimal educational tracing printable cover on warm neutral desk, black and white line-art learning sheets, calm premium mom brand aesthetic

pages.title: Trace the letter A
pages.label: Trace the letter A
pages.caption: Trace slowly and say the letter out loud.

pages.title: Trace the number 3
pages.label: Trace the number 3
pages.caption: Trace each number and practice again on the lines.

pages.title: Trace the word SUN
pages.label: Trace the word SUN
pages.caption: Trace the word and practice writing it below.

packs.title: Matching Activities Pack
packs.subtitle: Simple pair matching pages with a clean, uncluttered layout.
packs.cover_caption: Pair, match, and connect without crowded visuals.
packs.preview_prompt: Minimal matching activity worksheet cover for kids, premium printable mockup, black and white line art pages, soft neutral tabletop

pages.title: Object to Shadow Matching
pages.caption: Draw a line to match each pair.

packs.title: Cut & Paste Pack
packs.subtitle: Hands-on printable pages with clean spacing for little scissors.
packs.cover_caption: Build simple objects one page at a time.
packs.preview_prompt: Kids cut and paste printable pack cover mockup, modern neutral lifestyle brand, clean worksheet stack, black and white activity sheets

pages.title: Cut & Paste Activity
pages.caption: Cut the shapes and place them in the right spots.

packs.title: Find & Seek Pack
packs.subtitle: Hidden object pages that are fun, clean, and slightly challenging.
packs.cover_caption: A little challenge with lots of breathing room.
packs.preview_prompt: Hidden object printable pack cover page, premium minimalist kids activity bundle, neutral desk scene, black and white worksheet stack

pages.title: Find & Seek
pages.caption: Find 5 circles and 4 stars in the scene.

packs.title: Quiet Time Pack
packs.subtitle: Low-stimulation prompt pages for slower, calmer parts of the day.
packs.cover_caption: Soft, minimal pages for slower moments.
packs.preview_prompt: Quiet time printable pack cover, soft minimal kids worksheet aesthetic, premium neutral brand, black and white printable pages on desk

pages.title: Quiet Time - Favorite Thing
pages.caption: Take your time and fill the page with your favorite thing.

pages.title: Quiet Time - Feelings
pages.caption: Use this page to draw your feelings in a simple way.
